data.content: [2026-04-15] Partial progress: PlanStepProgress, NextPlanStep types exist in orchestration-plan-types.ts. deriveProgress() in orchestration-plan-manager.ts already computes nextStep by walking waves/steps to find the first incomplete one — satisfaction is derived from live beat states (only shipped counts). What remains: mutable per-step state for external agent driving. Currently there is no way to mark a step as started/in-progress/failed independently of beat state. Design question: should step execution state live in the execution_plan knot payload (requiring payload writes on start/complete/fail) or remain purely derived? The answer likely depends on 18e3 (step routes) since those routes need to either mutate payload or just signal beat-level transitions. Plan accordingly.
